instructions.name: initiate
docs: Initiates the atomic swap. Funds are transferred from the initiator to the token vault.
As such, the initiator's signature is required for this instruction.
`swap_amount` represents the quantity of native SOL to be transferred
through this atomic swap in base units (aka lamports).
E.g: A quantity of 1 SOL must be provided as 1,000,000,000.
`expires_in_slots` represents the number of slots (1 slot = 400ms) after
which (non-instant) refunds are allowed.

accounts.name: swap_account
docs: A PDA that maintains the on-chain state of the atomic swap throughout its lifecycle.
It also serves as the "vault" for this swap, by escrowing the SOL involved in this swap.
The choice of seeds ensures that any swap with equal `initiator` and
`secret_hash` cannot be created until an existing one completes.
This PDA will be deleted upon completion of the swap.

accounts.name: initiator
docs: The initiator of the atomic swap. They must sign this transaction.

instructions.name: instant_refund
docs: Funds are returned to the initiator, with the redeemer's consent.
As such, the redeemer's signature is required for this instruction.
This allows for refunds before the expiry slot.

accounts.name: swap_account
docs: The PDA holding the state information of the atomic swap.
Will be closed upon successful execution and the resulting rent
will be transferred to the initiator.

accounts.name: initiator
docs: This is included here for the PDA rent refund using the `close` attribute above.

instructions.name: redeem
docs: Funds are transferred to the redeemer. This instruction does not require any signatures.

accounts.name: swap_account
docs: The PDA holding the state information of the atomic swap.
Will be closed upon successful execution and the resulting rent
will be transferred to the initiator.

accounts.name: initiator
docs: This is included here for the PDA rent refund using the `close` attribute above.

instructions.name: refund
docs: Funds are returned to the initiator, given that no redeems have occured
and the expiry slot has been reached.
This instruction does not require any signatures.

accounts.name: swap_account
docs: The PDA holding the state information of the atomic swap.
Will be closed upon successful execution and the resulting rent
will be transferred to the initiator.

accounts.name: initiator
docs: This is included here for the PDA rent refund using the `close` attribute above.

errors.name: DefaultRedeemer
errors.msg: The redeemer should not be the default pubkey

errors.name: InvalidRedeemer
errors.msg: The provided redeemer is not the original redeemer of this swap

errors.name: InvalidSecret
errors.msg: The provided secret does not correspond to the secret hash of this swap

errors.name: RedeemerSameAsInitiator
errors.msg: Redeemer should not be the same as the initiator

errors.name: RefundBeforeExpiry
errors.msg: Attempt to perform a refund before expiry time

errors.name: ZeroExpiresInSlots
errors.msg: Expires in slots must be non zero

errors.name: ZeroSwapAmount
errors.msg: Swap amount should be non zero

errors.name: InvalidInitiator
errors.msg: The provided initiator is not the original initiator of this swap

types.name: Initiated
docs: Represents the initiated state of the swap where the initiator has deposited funds into the vault

fields.name: swap_amount
docs: The quantity of native SOL transferred through this atomic swap in base units (aka lamports).
E.g: A quantity of 1 SOL will be represented as 1,000,000,000.

fields.name: destination_data
docs: Optional metadata for cross-chain relayers; not persisted on-chain.

types.name: InstantRefunded
docs: Represents the instant refund state of the swap, where the initiator has withdrawn funds from the vault
with the redeemer's consent

types.name: Redeemed
docs: Represents the redeemed state of the swap, where the redeemer has withdrawn funds from the vault

types.name: Refunded
docs: Represents the refund state of the swap, where the initiator has withdrawn funds from the vault past expiry

types.name: SwapAccount
docs: Stores the state information of the atomic swap on-chain

fields.name: swap_amount
docs: The quantity of native SOL to be transferred through this atomic swap in base units (lamports).

fields.name: expiry_slot
docs: The exact slot after which (non-instant) refunds are allowed

fields.name: initiator
docs: The initiator of the atomic swap

fields.name: redeemer
docs: The redeemer of the atomic swap

fields.name: secret_hash
docs: The secret hash associated with the atomic swap
